description: Source-patch defaults — DISABLED. As of the runtime-override redesign, gbrain-patchkit no longer modifies ~/gbrain source files for the Haiku/Sonnet model IDs. Instead, anthropic-override.js (loaded via BUN_PRELOAD from env.sh) intercepts Messages.create at SDK call time and swaps models based on GBRAIN_EXPANSION_MODEL / GBRAIN_SUBAGENT_MODEL. These entries are kept here so existing installs can `gbrain-patchkit revert` cleanly, and so anyone who really wants source-edit behavior can flip `enabled: true`. New users should leave them as-is. Add your own entries below if you need to patch other gbrain source for reasons the runtime override can't address.

substitutions.name: env-driven expansion model (legacy source patch — superseded by anthropic-override.js)
env-driven subagent default model (legacy source patch — superseded by anthropic-override.js)
